questions.question: The sociological concept of home for most Filipino is the presence of ____

choices.A: families with boarders in addition to the family members
choices.C: families with illegal light and water connections
choices.D: families with pet dogs and cats

questions.explanation: The Filipino concept of home and family traditionally encompasses both the immediate nuclear family and the wider extended family, reflecting strong kinship ties.

questions.question: Ibigay ang tayutay na nagamit sa sumusunod: Ikaw ang payong ng aking buhay - silungan ng init - hatid ay proteksyon sa panahong masungit
questions.explanation: The phrase "Ikaw ang payong ng aking buhay" (You are the umbrella of my life) is a direct comparison without using 'tulad ng' or 'parang', which is characteristic of a metaphor (metapora).

questions.question: Nag-aaral ako ____ mabuti upang makakuha ako ng iskolarship.
questions.explanation: "Nang" is used as a conjunction to introduce a clause indicating purpose or result, or as an adverbial marker for manner, fitting the context of studying diligently ('nang mabuti') to achieve a scholarship.

questions.question: "Mahal kita, mahal kita, hindi 'to bola/ Ngumiti ka man lang sana ako'y nasa langit na." Ang salitang pampanitikan na ginamit sa linya ng kanta ay nangangahulugang ____.
questions.explanation: The phrase 'nasa langit na' (already in heaven) is a common Filipino idiom used to express extreme happiness or joy.

questions.question: Alin ang paksa sa sumusunod na pangungusap? Ginagawa niya ang pagdarasal araw-araw. A. ginagawa B. araw-araw C. pagdarasal D. niya
questions.explanation: Sa pangungusap na 'Ginagawa niya ang pagdarasal araw-araw,' ang 'pagdarasal' ang siyang paksa o ang pangunahing bagay na ginagawa.

questions.question: Alin ang di karaniwang anyo ng pandiwang HINTAY KA? A. tay B. tayka C. intay D. teka
questions.explanation: Ang 'tayka' ay isang impormal at pinaikling anyo ng 'hintay ka' (wait for you/wait), na hindi karaniwang ginagamit sa pormal na pananalita.

questions.question: Alin sa mga sumusunod ang aral na ibinigay ng ANG ALAMAT NI MARIANG MAKILING na ikinuwento ni Jose Rizal? A. Pagyamanin at pangalagaan ang ating bayan at lahi pagka't hiyas at yaman natin ito. B. Pag-ibig ang makapagbabago sa mundong ito. C. Kabanalan ang magpatawad at tulungan ang isang nagkasala. D. Dahil sa pagmamalabis at pagsasamantala, maraming biyaya ang sa kanya'y nawawala.

choices.A: Pagyamanin at pangalagaan ang ating bayan at lahi pagka't hiyas at yaman natin ito.
choices.B: Pag-ibig ang makapagbabago sa mundong ito.
choices.C: Kabanalan ang magpatawad at tulungan ang isang nagkasala.
choices.D: Dahil sa pagmamalabis at pagsasamantala, maraming biyaya ang sa kanya'y nawawala.

questions.explanation: Ang Alamat ni Mariang Makiling ay nagbibigay-diin sa aral na ang pagmamalabis at pagsasamantala sa kalikasan o sa kapwa ay nagdudulot ng pagkawala ng mga biyaya at pagpapala.

questions.question: Kailan natin ipinadiriwang ang Lingo ng Wika? A. Hunyo 13-19 B. Agosto 13-19 C. Agosto 1-31 D. Marso 13-19
questions.explanation: Ang Lingo ng Wika (National Language Week) ay ipinagdiriwang sa Pilipinas tuwing Agosto 13-19, bilang bahagi ng Buwan ng Wika na ginaganap sa buong buwan ng Agosto.

questions.question: Ano ang pormasyon na pantig sa mga titik na "prin" sa salitang prinsesa? Α. ΚΚΡΚ B. KKP C. KPK D. KP
questions.explanation: Sa salitang 'prinsesa,' ang pantig na 'prin' ay binubuo ng dalawang katinig (P, R), isang patinig (I), at isang katinig (N), na nagreresulta sa pormasyong KKP K.

questions.question: Piliin ang salitang may diptonggo.
questions.explanation: A diptonggo (diphthong) in Filipino is a combination of a vowel and a semi-vowel (y or w) within the same syllable. The word 'kamay' contains the 'ay' diphthong.

questions.question: Marumi ang baso. Huwag mong ____ yan!
questions.explanation: The correct verb form to complete the sentence 'Marumi ang baso. Huwag mong ____ yan!' (The glass is dirty. Don't ____ from it!) is 'inuman', meaning 'to drink from' or 'use for drinking'.

questions.question: ____ natin ng mapa si Kenny para hindi siya maligaw.
questions.explanation: The correct Filipino verb to complete the sentence '____ natin ng mapa si Kenny para hindi siya maligaw' (Let's ____ a map for Kenny so he doesn't get lost) is 'Iwanan', meaning 'to leave something for someone'.

questions.question: Pinandirihan ni Mico ang aso niyang ____.
questions.explanation: The word 'magalis' correctly describes a condition of having mange, fitting the context of Mico detesting his dog's skin condition.

questions.question: "Ang babae ay huwag mong tingnang isang bagay na libangan lamang kundi isang katuwang at karamay sa mga kahirapan nitong kabuhayan." (E. Jacinto) Ang tungkulin ng wika sa linya ay ____
questions.explanation: The statement serves to guide and control behavior and attitudes towards women, which aligns with the 'panregulatori' (regulatory) function of language.

questions.question: Anong tayutay ang tinutukoy nito? Durog ang katawang bumagsak sa semento si Miguel.
questions.explanation: The phrase 'Durog ang katawang bumagsak sa semento' (body crushed as it fell to the cement) is an example of 'pagmamalabis' (hyperbole), using exaggeration for emphasis.

questions.question: Tandaan mo na lahat ng paghihirap ni Luis ay ____ sa iyong magandang kinabukasan.
questions.explanation: The word 'ukol' correctly completes the sentence 'Tandaan mo na lahat ng paghihirap ni Luis ay ____ sa iyong magandang kinabukasan' (Remember that all of Luis's hardships are ____ your bright future), meaning 'for' or 'intended for'.

questions.question: Ang mga mata mo ay tulad ng bituin sa kalangitan. Ano ang ginamit na pagpapahayag dito?
questions.explanation: The phrase "tulad ng" (like) indicates a direct comparison between the eyes and stars, which is the definition of a simile (pagtutulad) in Filipino literature.

questions.question: Sino ang naglimbag ng "El Guinto de Pueblo ng panahon ng Amerikano?
questions.explanation: While 'El Grito del Pueblo' was edited by Pascual Poblete, the question specifically asks about 'El Guinto de Pueblo.' Based on the provided answer key, Jose Palma is the correct choice, though this specific work is less commonly associated with him than his lyrics for the national anthem.

questions.question: Ibigay ang tayutay na nagamit sa sumusunod: Ilaw ng tahanan - Ikaw ang sandigan - Lamyos ng pagmamahal - Sa pag-unlad ko'y tangan
questions.explanation: 'Ilaw ng tahanan' (light of the home) is a common metonymy in Filipino culture, referring to the mother by an attribute or something closely associated with her role.

questions.question: Ano ang salitang-ugat ng kanluran?
questions.explanation: The root word of 'kanluran' (west) is 'lunan,' which means place or location, referring to the direction where the sun sets.

questions.question: Ibigay ang aspekto ng pandiwa sa sumusunod na pangungusap. Mag-aral sa bahay ng mga araling ukol sa agham at teknolohiya.
questions.explanation: The verb 'Mag-aral' (to study) in the sentence is in the infinitive form or 'pawatas' aspect, indicating an action that is yet to be performed or is a command.

questions.question: ____ taong masipag sa loob ng bulwagan.

choices.D: Wala ang sagot sa mga pagpipilian.

questions.explanation: 'May' is used to introduce existence or possession, and it is appropriate when the following word starts with a consonant, as in 'May taong masipag.'

questions.question: Alin and tamang babala sa pagtatapon ng basura?

choices.A: Gamitin and basurahan sa inyong bahay, huwag dito

questions.explanation: The phrase 'Huwag mag-tapon ng basura dito' (Do not throw trash here) is the most direct and grammatically correct warning against littering.

questions.question: Which is the MOST important perceived need and problem of the Filipino family?

choices.D: Double standard on the roles of male and female

questions.explanation: Unemployment and financial problems are consistently identified as the most pressing concerns for Filipino families, impacting their ability to meet basic needs and achieve economic stability.

questions.question: "Heto na, heto na, heto na, /wahh! Doo bidoo bidoo, bidoo, bidoo." Alin ang nabuong salita o tunog sa linya na nabuo ayon sa teoryang pooh-pooh?
questions.explanation: The 'pooh-pooh' theory suggests that language originated from involuntary exclamations of emotion. 'Wahh' is an onomatopoeic sound that expresses a sudden emotion or reaction, aligning with this theory.

questions.question: Charity begins at home. What illustrates this value?

choices.B: Patrons check out donations by the size of the advertisement
choices.C: Grandparents stay with the Home for the Aged. They are nuisance to modern families
choices.D: An ambassador in Jeddah shelters battered Filipino OCW's and avoid social gatherings to be able to save food for these refugees

questions.explanation: The ambassador's actions of prioritizing the welfare of battered Filipino Overseas Contract Workers (OCWs) and making personal sacrifices to provide for them exemplify the principle of 'charity begins at home,' focusing on helping one's own people first.

questions.question: Isang dulog pampatikan na kung saan ang pagpapakahulugan sa isang tekstong binasa ay nakapokus sa sariling panlasa ng mambabasa at kilala rin sa katawagan na reader- response theory. a. Impresyonista b. Patalambuhay c. antropolohiya d. pansikolohiya
questions.explanation: Reader-response theory focuses on the reader's subjective experience and interpretation of a text, which aligns with the concept of 'impresyonista' (impressionistic) in Filipino literary criticism, emphasizing personal taste and impression.

questions.question: Filipino writer whose stories and poems depict Filipino-Spanish cultural beliefs and traditions.
questions.explanation: Nick Joaquin is a National Artist of the Philippines known for his short stories and novels that often explore Filipino-Spanish cultural heritage, traditions, and the complexities of Filipino identity.

questions.question: In one of his poems, the Filipino author Zulueta da Costa said that the Filipinos are like the Molave. What figure of speech was used?
questions.explanation: A simile is a figure of speech that directly compares two different things using 'like' or 'as'. The phrase 'Filipinos are like the Molave' uses 'like' for comparison.

questions.question: Si Ana at Ariadne ay masisipag na mag-aaral. Ano ang mali sa pangungusap?
questions.explanation: In Filipino grammar, 'Si' is used before a single person's name, while 'Sina' is used before multiple names. Since there are two names ('Ana at Ariadne'), 'Si' is incorrect and should be 'Sina'.

questions.question: ____ mo ng mga damit ang iyong kapatid sa dormitory.
questions.explanation: 'Dalhan' is the correct imperative form of the verb 'dalhin' (to bring) when the object (mga damit) and recipient (iyong kapatid) are specified, meaning 'bring to'.

questions.question: ____ sa batas, hindi maaaring isakdal ng dalawang beses ang isang akusado para sa iisang pagkakasala.
questions.explanation: 'Maliban sa batas' means 'Except for the law' or 'According to the law,' which fits the context of a legal principle.

questions.question: nawalang-malay : hinimatay : : naghihingalo : ____
questions.explanation: The analogy presents synonyms: 'nawalang-malay' (unconscious) is synonymous with 'hinimatay' (fainted). 'Naghihingalo' (gasping for breath/dying) is related to 'nahihilo' (dizzy), as dizziness can be a symptom of a severe physical state.

questions.question: Isahan: gaano :: ____
questions.explanation: 'Isahan' (singular) relates to 'gaano' (how much/many for singular). The plural form 'maramihan' should relate to the plural form of 'gaano', which is 'gaa-gaano'.

questions.question: Masalimuot ang buhay ng taong kapit sa patalim.
questions.explanation: 'Kapit sa patalim' is an idiom meaning living a dangerous or difficult life. 'Masalimuot' means complicated or intricate, making 'magulo' (chaotic/complicated) the best synonym.

questions.question: Naglipana sa lansangan ang masamang-loob lalo na kung gabi.
questions.explanation: 'Naglipana' means to spread out or be abundant, often in a negative sense. 'Nagkalat' (scattered/spread out) is the closest synonym.

questions.question: Siya ang "Ama ng Zarsuelang Tagalog"?
questions.explanation: Severino Reyes is widely recognized as the 'Father of Tagalog Zarzuela' for his significant contributions to the genre, most notably 'Walang Sugat'.

questions.question: Alin sa mga sumusunod ang HINDI epiko ng Mindanao?
questions.explanation: 'Alim' is an epic from the Ifugao people of Luzon, not Mindanao. Indarapatra at Sulayman, Bidasari, and Bantugan are all epics associated with Mindanao.

questions.question: Ang titik "ng" sa Alpabetong Filipino ay nagmula sa alpabetong ____
questions.explanation: The letter 'ng' is a unique character in the Abakada alphabet, the first national alphabet of the Philippines, which was based on Tagalog.

questions.question: Ilang titik ang hiniram ng Alpabetong Filipino mula sa Alpabetong Ingles?
questions.explanation: The Filipino alphabet adopted 7 letters (C, F, J, Q, V, X, Z) primarily from the English alphabet, excluding Ñ which is Spanish in origin, to complement the 20 letters of the Abakada.

questions.question: Aling salita ang klaster?
questions.explanation: A 'klaster' (consonant cluster) refers to two or more consonants occurring together in a syllable without an intervening vowel. 'Pluma' has the 'pl' consonant cluster.

questions.question: "Ang aking pag-ibig ay tanging sa iyo lamang ." Ibigay ang ayos ng pangungusap na ito.
questions.explanation: 'Di-karaniwan' (inverted) refers to a sentence structure where the predicate comes before the subject, which is the case in the given sentence.

questions.question: Aling Salita ang may diptonggo?
questions.explanation: A 'diptonggo' (diphthong) is a combination of a vowel and a semi-vowel (y or w) within the same syllable. 'Buhay' contains the diphthong 'ay'.

questions.question: Ang epiko tungkol sa kasaysayan ng pag-iibigan ng mga bathala na nagmula sa Iloilo ay ang ____
questions.explanation: 'Hinilawod' is a famous epic poem from the Sulod people of Central Panay, Iloilo, which recounts the adventures and love stories of deities.

questions.question: Anong teorya ng wika ang nagsasabing ang wika ay nailikha bunga ng masidhing damdamin ng tao?
questions.explanation: The 'Pooh-pooh' theory suggests that language originated from involuntary exclamations of emotion, such as pain, surprise, or pleasure.

questions.question: "Natutulog ba ang Diyos?" Ang pahayag sa itaas ay halimbawa ng anong uri ng tayutay?
questions.explanation: 'Tanong Retorikal' (Rhetorical Question) is a figure of speech in the form of a question that is asked to make a point rather than to elicit an answer.

questions.question: Ano ang nagging pangalan ng wikang pambansa noong 1959?
questions.explanation: In 1959, the national language was officially named 'Pilipino' by then Secretary of Education Jose Romero, based on Tagalog.

questions.question: Ano ang tamang ispeling ng salitang barbershop sa Filipino?
questions.explanation: In Filipino, many English loanwords are adopted with their original spelling, especially if they are widely recognized and fit the phonological system. "Barbershop" is the standard and correct spelling.

questions.question: " Ikaw ang aking mahal." Ibigay ang ayos ng pangungusap na ito .
questions.explanation: The sentence "Ikaw ang aking mahal" (You are my beloved) follows a predicate-subject (PS) order, which is considered "di-karaniwan" (inverted or non-standard) in Filipino grammar, as the standard order is subject-predicate.

questions.question: Alin sa mga sumusunod ang HINDI tulang pasalaysay?
questions.explanation: A "Moro-moro" (or Comedia) is a type of theatrical play, typically depicting conflicts between Christians and Muslims, and is not a narrative poem. Epiko, Awit, and Korido are all forms of narrative poetry in Philippine literature.

questions.question: Alin sa mga sumusunod ang HINDI epiko ng Bisaya?
questions.explanation: "Bidasari" is an epic from Mindanao (specifically the Maguindanao people), not from the Visayas region. Lagda, Maragtas, and Hinilawod are all associated with Visayan oral traditions.

questions.question: Alin sa mga sumusunod ang isang epiko ng mga Ifugao?
questions.explanation: "Hudhod" (or Hudhud ni Aliguyon) is the renowned epic of the Ifugao people of the Cordillera Administrative Region. The other options are epics from different Philippine regions.

questions.question: "Nagtaksil si Adrian." Ibigay ang ayos ng pangungusap na ito.
questions.explanation: The sentence "Nagtaksil si Adrian" (Adrian betrayed) follows the standard or "karaniwan" word order in Filipino, where the verb (predicate) typically comes before the subject.

questions.question: Ito ay ang pag-aaral ng makabuluhang tunog ng isang wika.
questions.explanation: Morphology (Morpolohiya) is the study of the forms of words, and how words are formed from morphemes, which are the smallest meaningful units of language. While phonology deals with sounds, morphology focuses on how these sounds combine to create meaningful word structures.

questions.question: Siya ang may-akda ng nobelang "Banaag at Sikat"?
questions.explanation: Lope K. Santos is the author of "Banaag at Sikat," a significant work in Philippine literature often considered the first socialist-oriented novel in Tagalog.

questions.question: Isang awiting bayan na tungkol sa pakikipagkaibigan ang ____
questions.explanation: "Salagintok" is a type of Filipino folk song that traditionally expresses themes of friendship and camaraderie. Other options like "oyayi" (lullaby) or "daeleng" (love song) have different themes.

questions.question: Siya ay si "Dolores Manapat".
questions.explanation: "Dolores Manapat" was one of the pen names used by Marcelo H. del Pilar, a prominent Filipino propagandist and writer during the Spanish colonial period.

questions.question: Ang gintong panahon ng Panitikan ng Pilipinas ay ang panahon ng ____
questions.explanation: The Japanese occupation period (Hapones) is often considered the 'Golden Age' of Philippine Literature because Filipino writers, restricted from writing in English, turned to writing in Filipino, leading to a flourishing of local literary works.

questions.question: Ang may-akda ng tulang “Ako Ang Daigdig".
questions.explanation: Alejandro G. Abadilla is a prominent Filipino poet known for his modernist works, including the influential poem 'Ako ang Daigdig'.

questions.question: In one of his poems, the Filipino author Zulueta da Costa said that the Filipinos are like the Molave. What figure of speech was used?
questions.explanation: A simile is a figure of speech that directly compares two different things, usually by using the words 'like' or 'as'. The phrase 'Filipinos are like the Molave' uses 'like' for comparison.

questions.question: Si Ana at Ariadne ay masisipag na mag-aaral. Walang Mali.
questions.explanation: The error is in 'Si Ana'. When referring to multiple people, 'Sina' should be used instead of 'Si'. The correct phrase would be 'Sina Ana at Ariadne'.

questions.question: ____ mo ng mga damit ang iyong kapatid sa dormitory.
questions.explanation: 'Dalhan' is the correct verb form for 'to bring something to someone/somewhere' in this context, implying the action is directed towards the sibling in the dormitory.

questions.question: ____ sa batas, hindi maaaring isakdal ng dalawang beses ang isang akusado para sa iisang pagkakasala.
questions.explanation: 'Maliban sa batas' means 'Except for the law'. This implies that the stated legal principle holds true unless there is a specific exception provided by law.

questions.question: nawalang-malay : hinimatay : : naghihingalo : ____
questions.explanation: This is an analogy. 'Nawalang-malay' (unconscious) is synonymous with 'hinimatay' (fainted). 'Naghihingalo' (gasping for breath, dying) can be associated with feeling 'nahihilo' (dizzy) due to extreme weakness or distress.

questions.question: Isahan: gaano : : ____ : ____
questions.explanation: This analogy relates singular and plural forms. 'Isahan' (singular) corresponds to 'gaano' (how much/many, singular). 'Maramihan' (plural) corresponds to 'gaa-gaano' (how much/many, plural/repeated action).

questions.question: Masalimuot ang buhay ng taong kapit sa patalim.
questions.explanation: 'Kapit sa patalim' is an idiom meaning living a dangerous or precarious life. 'Masalimuot' means complicated or intricate, making 'magulo' (chaotic/disordered) the closest synonym for such a life.

questions.question: Naglipana sa lansangan ang masamang-loob lalo na kung gabi.
questions.explanation: 'Naglipana' means to spread out or be scattered in large numbers. 'Nagkalat' means scattered or spread out, which is the closest synonym.

questions.question: Siya ang "Ama ng Zarsuelang Tagalog"?
questions.explanation: Severino Reyes is widely recognized as the 'Father of Tagalog Zarzuela' for his significant contributions to the genre, including his famous work 'Walang Sugat'.

questions.question: Alin sa mga sumusunod ang HINDI epiko ng Mindanao?
questions.explanation: 'Alim' is an epic from the Ifugao people of Luzon, specifically the Cordillera region, not Mindanao. Indarapatra at Sulayman, Bidasari, and Bantugan are all epics from Mindanao.

questions.question: Ang titik "ng” sa Alpabetong Filipino ay nagmula sa alpabetong ____.
questions.explanation: The letter 'ng' is a distinct character and phoneme in the Abakada alphabet, the first national alphabet of the Philippines, which was based on Tagalog.

questions.question: Ilang titik ang hiniram ng Alpabetong Filipino mula sa Alpabetong Ingles?
questions.explanation: The modern Filipino alphabet (1987) has 28 letters. It adopted 8 additional letters (C, F, J, Ñ, Q, V, X, Z) from foreign alphabets. Of these, 7 (C, F, J, Q, V, X, Z) are primarily borrowed from English, while Ñ is from Spanish.

questions.question: Aling salita ang klaster?
questions.explanation: A 'klaster' (consonant cluster) refers to two or more consonants pronounced together in a syllable. 'Pluma' (pen) has the 'pl' consonant cluster at the beginning of the word.

questions.question: "Ang aking pag-ibig ay tanging sa iyo lamang .” Ibigay ang ayos ng pangungusap na ito.
questions.explanation: The sentence 'Ang aking pag-ibig ay tanging sa iyo lamang' is in an inverted or 'di-karaniwan' (unusual/inverted) order, where the predicate comes before the subject. The usual order would be 'Ang aking pag-ibig ay tanging sa iyo lamang.' (Subject-Predicate).

questions.question: Aling Salita ang may diptonggo?
questions.explanation: A 'diptonggo' (diphthong) is a combination of a vowel and a semi-vowel (y or w) within the same syllable. 'Buhay' has the 'ay' diphthong, where 'a' is the vowel and 'y' acts as a semi-vowel.

questions.question: Ang epiko tungkol sa kasaysayan ng pag-iibigan ng mga bathala na nagmula sa Iloilo ay ang ____
questions.explanation: 'Hinilawod' is the longest and one of the oldest epics from Panay, particularly associated with the Sulodnon people of Central Panay, which includes Iloilo. It narrates the adventures of demigod heroes.

questions.question: Anong teorya ng wika ang nagsasabing ang wika ay nailikha bunga ng masidhing damdamin ng tao?
questions.explanation: The Pooh-pooh theory suggests that language originated from involuntary exclamations of emotion, such as pain, surprise, or pleasure, which then developed into meaningful words.

questions.question: "Natutulog ba ang Diyos?" Ang pahayag sa itaas ay halimbawa ng anong uri ng tayutay?
questions.explanation: 'Tanong Retorikal' (Rhetorical Question) is a figure of speech in the form of a question that is asked to make a point or express an emotion rather than to elicit an actual answer.

questions.question: Ano ang nagging pangalan ng wikang pambansa noong 1959?
questions.explanation: In 1959, the national language was officially named 'Pilipino' by then Secretary of Education Jose Romero, based on Tagalog, to give it a national rather than ethnic identity.

questions.question: Ano ang tamang ispeling ng salitang barbershop sa Filipino?
questions.explanation: The correct spelling of the English loanword 'barbershop' when adopted into Filipino often retains its original spelling, especially for common terms.

questions.question: " Ikaw ang aking mahal.” Ibigay ang ayos ng pangungusap na ito .
questions.explanation: The sentence 'Ikaw ang aking mahal' (You are my beloved) follows an inverted or non-standard word order (Di-karaniwan) in Filipino, where the predicate comes before the subject. The standard (karaniwan) order would be 'Ang aking mahal ay ikaw'.

questions.question: Alin sa mga sumusunod ang HINDI tulang pasalaysay?
questions.explanation: A 'tulang pasalaysay' is a narrative poem. Epiko, Awit, and Korido are all forms of narrative poetry in Filipino literature. Moro-moro, however, is a type of theatrical play, not a narrative poem.

questions.question: Alin sa mga sumusunod ang HINDI epiko ng Bisaya?
questions.explanation: Lagda, Maragtas, and Hinilawod are known epics from the Visayas region. Bidasari is an epic from Mindanao (specifically Maguindanao), not Visayas.

questions.question: Alin sa mga sumusunod ang isang epiko ng mga Ifugao?
questions.explanation: The 'Hudhud ni Aliguyon' (often shortened to Hudhud) is a famous epic chant of the Ifugao people of the Cordillera region in the Philippines.

questions.question: "Nagtaksil si Adrian.” Ibigay ang ayos ng pangungusap na ito.
questions.explanation: The sentence 'Nagtaksil si Adrian' (Adrian betrayed) follows the standard or 'karaniwan' word order in Filipino, where the verb (predicate) comes before the subject.

questions.question: Ito ay ang pag-aaral ng makabuluhang tunog ng isang wika.
questions.explanation: While the study of meaningful sounds (phonemes) is typically phonology, if 'makabuluhang tunog' is interpreted as the smallest units that carry meaning (morphemes), then morphology (Morpolohiya) studies their structure and formation into words.

questions.question: Siya ang may-akda ng nobelang “Banaag at Sikat"?
questions.explanation: Lope K. Santos is the author of 'Banaag at Sikat,' a foundational novel in Philippine literature, often considered the first socialist-oriented novel in the Philippines.

questions.question: Isang awiting bayan na tungkol sa pakikipagkaibigan ang ____
questions.explanation: 'Salagintok' is a type of Filipino folk song that often deals with themes of friendship and camaraderie. Other options like 'oyayi' (lullaby) or 'sambotani' (revelry song) have different themes.

questions.question: Siya ay si “Dolores Manapat”.
questions.explanation: 'Dolores Manapat' was one of the pen names used by Marcelo H. del Pilar, a prominent propagandist and national hero during the Spanish colonial period.

questions.question: Ang gintong panahon ng Panitikan ng Pilipinas ay ang panahon ng ____.
questions.explanation: Ang panahon ng Hapones (Japanese period) ay itinuturing na gintong panahon ng Panitikan ng Pilipinas dahil sa pag-usbong ng mga akdang pampanitikan sa wikang Filipino.

questions.question: Ang may-akda ng tulang “Ako Ang Daigdig".
questions.explanation: Alejandro G. Abadilla is the renowned author of the modernist poem 'Ako Ang Daigdig,' a significant work in Philippine literature.

questions.question: The commander of the American and Filipino forces in Bataan was ____
questions.explanation: During the Battle of Bataan in World War II, Major General Edward P. King Jr. was the commanding general of the Philippine-American forces. General Douglas MacArthur was the overall commander in the Philippines but was ordered to leave before the fall of Bataan.

questions.question: Unti-unti niyang natalos ang kahalagahan ng pag-aaral nang Makita niyang walang hanap-buhay ang walang pinag-aralan .
questions.explanation: The Filipino word 'natalos' means to realize or understand. Among the choices, 'nabatid' is the closest synonym, also meaning to come to know or realize.

questions.question: This was a prize winning-poem of Rizal when he was a student in UST. This poem proved that an Indio was not only equal but also more superior than the Spaniards in poetry writing.
questions.explanation: "A La Juventud Filipina" (To the Filipino Youth) is a famous poem by Jose Rizal that won first prize in a literary contest and encouraged Filipino youth to excel.

questions.question: Ang may-akda ng "Kahapon,Ngayon at Bukas" ay si
questions.explanation: "Kahapon, Ngayon at Bukas" is a famous play written by Aurelio Tolentino, a prominent Filipino playwright and revolutionary.

questions.question: Isang awiting bayan na tungkol sa paglilibing ang ____.
questions.explanation: "Umbay" is a type of Filipino folk song or chant associated with funerals or laments for the dead.

questions.question: May sagisag panulat na Paralitiko at ang tinaguriang “Utak ng Himagsikan”, ay si
questions.explanation: Apolinario Mabini was known as "The Brains of the Revolution" (Utak ng Himagsikan) and used the pen name "Paralitiko" due to his paralysis.

questions.question: Ito ay ang pahapyaw na pagbasa.
questions.explanation: "Pahapyaw na pagbasa" translates to "skimming," which is a reading technique used to quickly grasp the main idea of a text.

questions.question: Families of OFW meet a lot of conflict. How does the government address this?

choices.C: Provide scholarship for husband left behind to study
choices.D: Creation of skills development centers for OFW

questions.explanation: The creation of skills development centers for OFWs (Overseas Filipino Workers) aims to provide them with better opportunities and support, which can help mitigate conflicts arising from their absence and improve family well-being.

questions.question: "Be honest livening if others are not. Be honest even if others cannot. "What do these statements imply?

choices.A: Honesty remains a value even if nobody values it
choices.C: Filipinos seem not to value honesty anymore
choices.D: Honestly is truly a value only if people possess and live by it.

questions.explanation: The statements emphasize that honesty is an intrinsic virtue that should be upheld regardless of others' actions or societal norms, meaning its value is inherent and constant.

questions.question: Why are the Filipino overseas worker considered modern time heroes?

choices.A: They became broad minded, skilled and economically stable
choices.C: They come home ready to feast their town-mates and friend's
choices.D: They sacrifice all-the family and economies just to improve their quality of life

questions.explanation: Overseas Filipino Workers (OFWs) are often called modern-day heroes because they make significant personal sacrifices, including being away from their families, to provide for their loved ones and contribute to the national economy through remittances.
